bugs.error_message: codexProxy logs under /Users/mr.j/.codexProxy/logs can grow without a size cap
bugs.root_cause: AppLogger only limited log file count and request blocks; active log files were not capped by byte size.
bugs.fix: Added size-based tail truncation at 500MB, preserving the latest 200MB on line boundaries during writes and startup cleanup.

bugs.error_message: 当前并发请求很卡，后面的请求很久才能回复
bugs.root_cause: Global max_concurrency permits are held across the full streaming response; debug logging also uses a synchronous global file mutex and some diagnostics are written directly and again through the Tauri log forwarding task. Load-balancer endpoint permits constrain upstream acquisition/first-response concurrency rather than the full SSE body.
bugs.fix: Changed the server connection builder to hyper-util auto (HTTP/1 + HTTP/2), released the global request-admission permit before spawning long-lived SSE streaming, removed duplicate file writes from the Tauri log forwarding task, and made AppLogger file writes non-blocking on logger lock contention.

bugs.root_cause: dark: text-dark-text-primary mb-4 leading-relaxed"> → bg-gray-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono">~/.codex/config.toml
bugs.fix: Changed dark: text-dark-text-primary mb-4 leading-relaxed"> → bg-gray-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono">~/.codex/config.toml
